zh.Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay是Sir Hugh Courtenay和Margaret Carminow的女兒，於1447年出生在英國可瓦爾波康諾可。她於大約1475年與John Trethurffe Esq.在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay是Sir Hugh Courtenay和Margaret Carminow的女儿，于1447年出生在英国可瓦爾波康諾可。她于大约1475年与John Trethurffe Esq.在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay was born in 1447, in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England as the daughter of Sir Hugh Courtenay and Margaret Carminow. She married John Trethurffe Esq. about 1475, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1510, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay est née en 1447, à Boconnoc, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fille de Sir Hugh Courtenay et Margaret Carminow. Elle a épousé John Trethurffe Esq. environ 1475, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay wurde 1447 in Boconnoc, Cornwall, England, als Tochter von Sir Hugh Courtenay und Margaret Carminow geboren. Sie hat um 1475 in Cornwall, England John Trethurffe Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay è nata il nel 1447 nel Boconnoc, Cornwall, England come figlia di Sir Hugh Courtenay e Margaret Carminow. Lei sposato John Trethurffe Esq. circa 1475, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1510, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenayは1447年にイギリスコルンワルボコノックでSir Hugh CourtenayとMargaret Carminowの娘として生まれた。約1475年にイギリスコルンワルでJohn Trethurffe Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay(은)는 1447년 영국 코른월 보코노크에서 Sir Hugh Courtenay(와)과 Margaret Carminow의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 영국 코른월에서 John Trethurffe Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay nasceu em 1447, em Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inglaterra filha de Sir Hugh Courtenay e Margaret Carminow. Ela casou-se com John Trethurffe Esq. aproximadamente 1475, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay родилась в 1447 г. в местности боконнок, корнвалл, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Hugh Courtenay и Margaret Carminow. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Trethurffe Esq. около 1475 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Courtenay nació en 1447, en Boconnoc, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Hugh Courtenay y Margaret Carminow. Se casó con John Trethurffe Esq. aproximadamente 1475, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1510, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
